metadata.name: GEN XYZ Das Occult #373
metadata.description:
A 10k Generative Profile Pic collection
GEN XYZ Das Occult - by culla - @tamccullough

move over cryptopunks
there is a new group on the scene

100% code - not an image composition

A bunch of common palettes
A selection of rare palettes
And a smaller set of ultra rare palettes
However, rarity will be based on what combinations the code produces

The majority of tokens will not have a special trait
However your token might have one or even multiple special traits
But, be aware that only the last special trait added will be listed in the features

Even then, look closely, because not all aspects of the canvas are included in the features. Collectors should still look closely and choose what they like when buying on secondary.

Which team are you on? X or O?

follow culla on twitter for updates. Or maybe __acolyte__

If the non reserved tokens mint out quickly, Access List mints will have 24 hours to mint reserves assigned to those wallets

Thank you for supporting an emerging artist in the generative art space

Access List reserves were given to holders of the following PFP collections created by culla
2x for each Basqunk held
1x for each Inkspunk, TwoFourQunk, V0iD, DeeManz, Punkasso and CR0$$KULL
You would have needed to transfer the above tokens to your mint wallet at the time of the snapshot

share your tokens on social media with #genxyznft
Made with love by culla using p5.js

metadata.name: WOJAK #7
metadata.description:
Generative Wojak collection

Create your Wojak!

7 Backgrounds
9 Mouths
8 Eyes
6 Wrinkles
15 Accessories

metadata.name: Pipes  #54
metadata.description:
In his 2023 book, 'The Beauty of Play', Frank Lantz writes, 'Games are an aesthetic form. Which is to say they are something we do for their own sake, in search of beauty, pleasure and meaning, a realm in which our subjective tastes and individual experiences are joined together into communities of critical judgement and overlapping but contested values'.



'Pipes' is a reimagining of the game 'Pipe Mania', released in 1990 by Empire Software. While in the original game, the aim for the player is to connect a series of randomly generated pipe pieces to ensure the flow of 'goo' for a specified distance, in 'Pipes', unique left-to right-pathways are generated section by section.



By refiguring this game and its components into a generative collection, 'Pipes' forms a part of an overarching series, 'The Art of Play', which seeks to highlight the aesthetic beauty of early gaming software.

metadata.name: Puzzles & Mysteries #73
metadata.description:
Nothing is true to reality about this piece.
Not the sky, nor the hills and definitely not the colors. 
It’s all about getting lost in a place we don’t know - A puzzle, a mystery and collecting the missing pieces.

Press “s” to save as png.

Made with p5js;

metadata.name: Pashut #103
metadata.description:
Random description about a random cube.

After fully loaded:
Press 's' to save as png.
Press 'r' to rotate the canvas.

Main features:
-Color palette 
-Background style
-Cubes style
-Cubes count

Created using p5js;

metadata.name: House of Birds #37
metadata.description:
"House of Birds" started as a few origami birds inside a frame.
But, birds don't need boundaries; birds need trees, hills, and sky.

Created using p5js;

Press "s" to save as png.

Twitter: @SapirCohen__

metadata.name: hUMBLE PUNK #9
metadata.description:
Welcometo hUMBLE PUNK project!

Facts:
1. 16x16 px pixel art
2. There are 6 leyers
- Background 17 items
- Body 6 items
- Mouth 6 items
- Hairdo 19 items
- Eyes 14 items
- Cloth 23 items
3. Rareness is driven by chances of display unequally items
4. Possibility to build one hUMBLE PUNK is much higher than 345 maximum minted allow.

Good Luck, fam.

Note: This project is Image Composition Layers pngs.

metadata.name: pico_punk_generator_generator.p8 #360
metadata.description:
Welcome to the ultimate pico_punk generator! This interactive token is a parameter based generator that creates unique pico_punk generators. Each one will generate one pico_punk with a number of layers chosen by you during the parameter selection phase. Additionally, you can use the buttons to navigate the generative space, and create your own pico_punks via an interactive process of discovery. This is the final pico_punk generator I intend to make, with the extra capabilities added by the parameter selection process, and the final tweaks and changes I made to the appearances and effects, I think this project is now as complete as I can ever make it.

The controls:
- arrow keys: move through the generative space... each step adds one layer to the composition
- x button: take a screenshot of the generated pico_punk
- o button: clear all layers except the current one (clean slate for building a new pico_punk)

Each layer has a chance to apply one of various visual effects, which vary in how transformative (or disruptive) they are.


pico_punks began as a project to create something akin to DOS Punks, but fully generative, without any manual intervention or pre-rendered components, using only the Pico-8 Fantasy Console. You can find the first generator here: (https://objkt.com/asset/hicetnunc/439049). In this early version, the generator was interactive, but each pico_punk was totally isolated, being generated from one unique seed and one consistent process. Over time, this evolved to this final experience: one in which the "curator", the user exploring the generator, is not just choosing from an infinite number of punks, but actually the process of exploration itself is modifying the output before your eyes.

pico_punks is all about exploring themes of irreversibility, noise, pattern recognition, pareidolia, and of course identity. What began for me as something bordering on satire, has become an integral part of how I represent myself online. It is my sincere wish that with these tools you are also able to create something unique that you feel represents you, and is something that couldn't have been made without you.

Thank you so much for these last couple years of support, and here's to many more making and collecting art together :)


Notes on minting: 
- 30% of royalties go to the minter
- 10% of royalties go to previous curated pico_punk holders
- One reserve spot is generated for each curated pico_punk held, and they stack
- One extra reserve spot is for my Mom
